instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission system shall perform gear shifts based on engine speed and vehicle speed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command an upshift when engine speed exceeds the calibrated upshift threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
IF Engine_Speed <= Upshift_RPM THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Vehicle_Speed < Min_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Inhibit
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Shift_Request = Upshift AND Gear_Position = Current_Gear THEN Execute_Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall downshift when engine speed drops below a calibrated limit.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger a downshift when engine speed falls below Downshift_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
IF Engine_Speed >= Downshift_RPM THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Min_Vehicle_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Disable_Shift
IF Gear_Position = First_Gear THEN Downshift_Command = Rejected

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall adjust shifting based on engine load conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall delay upshift when engine load exceeds Load_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN Upshift_Request = Delayed
IF Engine_Load <= Load_Limit AND Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
IF Vehicle_Speed < Min_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Inhibit
IF Engine_Load_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Gear_Position = Neutral THEN Shift_Command = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall shift gears based on combined engine speed and throttle conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit upshift when throttle position is below the calibrated threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM AND Throttle_Position < Throttle_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
IF Throttle_Position >= Throttle_Limit THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Vehicle_Speed < Min_Shift_Speed THEN Inhibit_Upshift
IF Throttle_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Gear_Position = Current_Gear AND Shift_Command = Upshift THEN Execute_Shift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall ensure smooth downshift during deceleration.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when engine speed falls within the calibrated deceleration range.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM AND Brake_Pedal_Status = Pressed THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
IF Engine_Speed >= Downshift_RPM THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Min_Vehicle_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Brake_Signal_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Gear_Position = First_Gear THEN Downshift_Command = Rejected

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform upshift based on vehicle speed thresholds.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall allow upshift when vehicle speed exceeds Upshift_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed > Upshift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Upshift_Speed THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Engine_Speed > Max_RPM THEN Force_Upshift
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Gear_Position = Top_Gear THEN Upshift_Command = Rejected

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform downshift when vehicle speed decreases significantly.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall initiate downshift when vehicle speed drops below Downshift_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed < Downshift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
IF Vehicle_Speed >= Downshift_Speed THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Engine_Speed < Idle_RPM THEN Downshift_Request = Rejected
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Gear_Position = First_Gear THEN Downshift_Command = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall coordinate shift decisions using engine speed and vehicle speed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit gear shift when both engine speed and vehicle speed satisfy calibrated limits.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM AND Vehicle_Speed > Min_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
IF Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM AND Vehicle_Speed < Downshift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
IF Vehicle_Speed < Min_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent unnecessary shifts under stable speed conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain the current gear when engine speed remains within the calibrated band.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed >= Downshift_RPM AND Engine_Speed <= Upshift_RPM THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
IF Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Gear_Position = Neutral THEN Shift_Command = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform gear shifts considering both vehicle speed and engine torque.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall delay upshift when torque demand is high.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Torque > Torque_Limit THEN Upshift_Request = Delayed
IF Engine_Torque <= Torque_Limit AND Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
IF Vehicle_Speed < Min_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Torque_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Gear_Position = Current_Gear AND Shift_Command = Upshift THEN Execute_Shift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall initiate downshift under low speed and load conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when engine speed and vehicle speed fall below thresholds.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM AND Vehicle_Speed < Downshift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
IF Engine_Speed >= Downshift_RPM THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Min_Vehicle_Speed THEN Downshift_Request = Rejected
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear shift during extremely low vehicle speeds.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit gear shift when vehicle speed is below Min_Shift_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed < Min_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed >= Min_Shift_Speed AND Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
IF Vehicle_Speed >= Min_Shift_Speed AND Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Gear_Position = Neutral THEN Shift_Command = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall coordinate engine speed and throttle for shift timing.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall delay downshift when throttle demand is high.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position > Throttle_Limit THEN Downshift_Request = Delayed
IF Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM AND Throttle_Position <= Throttle_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
IF Vehicle_Speed < Min_Shift_Speed THEN Downshift_Request = Rejected
IF Throttle_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Gear_Position = First_Gear THEN Downshift_Command = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall validate shift conditions before executing gear change.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall execute gear shift only when valid speed and load conditions are satisfied.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM AND Vehicle_Speed > Min_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
IF Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM AND Vehicle_Speed < Downshift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Delayed
IF Engine_Load_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Gear_Position = Current_Gear AND Shift_Command != None THEN Execute_Shift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall adapt shifting during moderate acceleration.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger upshift when engine speed exceeds calibrated limits during acceleration.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM AND Throttle_Position BETWEEN Moderate_Low AND Moderate_High THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
IF Engine_Speed <= Upshift_RPM THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Vehicle_Speed < Min_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Throttle_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Gear_Position = Top_Gear THEN Upshift_Command = Rejected

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall respond to varying engine loads during shifting.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall adjust shift timing based on engine load thresholds.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN Upshift_Request = Delayed
IF Engine_Load <= Load_Limit AND Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
IF Engine_Load < Low_Load_Limit AND Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
IF Engine_Load_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Gear_Position = Neutral THEN Shift_Command = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall adjust gear selection during steady cruising.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain gear when engine speed and vehicle speed remain within optimal cruising limits.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed BETWEEN Cruise_Min_RPM AND Cruise_Max_RPM THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Engine_Speed > Cruise_Max_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
IF Engine_Speed < Cruise_Min_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform safe gear changes under dynamic driving conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall evaluate speed, load, and throttle inputs before issuing gear shift commands.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM AND Vehicle_Speed > Min_Shift_Speed AND Throttle_Position < Throttle_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
IF Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM AND Vehicle_Speed < Downshift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Downshift
IF Engine_Load > Load_Limit THEN Upshift_Request = Delayed
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Gear_Position = Neutral THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
